No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course readings like 'The Neglected Suicide Epidemic' and 'Taking Care of Aging Parents' tangentially link to mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops skills for students' 'future career' (Target 4.4).
evidence: training students to develop writing and reading skills in English for school and for their future career

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop skills for students' 'future career,' directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5).
evidence: training students to develop writing and reading skills in English for school and for their future career

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Developing 'independent and critical judgment' (Core Competency B) is a foundational skill for innovation (Target 9.5), albeit an indirect link.
evidence: to develop independent and critical judgment

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Understanding 'different cultural perspectives' (Core Competency A) can foster social inclusion, linking indirectly to Target 10.2.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Skills like 'evaluate the relevancy and validity' and 'critical judgment' are foundational for accountable institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: evaluate the relevancy and validity of all supporting materials

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to global partnerships or cooperation.
